name: Briefs Voice Contract

timeline.summary: Compass brief contract for v0.1.11 is now fail-closed against stock framing: scoped 24h and 48h must never borrow global prose, the old Executive/Product versus Operator/Technical split is forbidden across narration and rendering, and provider plus deterministic briefs both reject internal canned wrappers before refresh can publish them.

what_it_is: Governed narration contract that keeps Compass briefs human, factual, friendly, and fail-closed.
why_tracked: Prevents brief-quality drift by keeping prompt, validator, cache policy, skills, and guidance under one product-owned contract.
